description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa upholstered in a dark blue fabric with a subtle, slightly textured finish. The sofa features two seat cushions and two backrest cushions, both of which are attached and have a uniform, rectangular shape. The armrests are angled outward and padded, giving the sofa a contemporary, flared silhouette. Two decorative throw pillows with a geometric blue and white pattern add visual interest and contrast to the solid upholstery. The sofa stands on four short, tapered wooden legs, which are slightly splayed for stability and style. The back of the sofa is plain and fully upholstered, maintaining a clean and cohesive appearance from all sides.
description: A modern dark blue three-seater sofa with flared padded armrests, attached cushions, and tapered wooden legs, accented by two geometric-patterned throw pillows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, two seat and back cushions, flared armrests, and two geometric-patterned throw pillows.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the angled armrest, sofa depth, and profile of the cushions and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, fully upholstered back and the splayed wooden legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, showing the armrest angle, cushion profile, and leg placement.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, attached seat cushions and two attached backrest cushions, all uniform in size; two loose, patterned throw pillows placed at each end.
attribute_armrest_style: Present, padded, and outwardly flared armrests that are slightly lower than the backrest and seat cushions, with a modern, angular profile and no visible decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, tapered wooden legs positioned at the corners, slightly splayed outward, with a visible brown wood finish and no central support.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with attached rectangular cushions and subtle tufting detail.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark blue fabric with a subtle texture; throw pillows feature a geometric blue and white pattern.
